commands.narrative:
**Roster:** No changes since yesterday — 76 strategies total (73 enabled, 3 disabled). Roster diff vs 2026-05-21 snapshot is clean.

**Headline — Circuit Breaker Fired + Pipeline Stalled:** The daily -1 SOL circuit breaker tripped at ~11:00 UTC (live P&L: -1.22 SOL across all three live_micro strategies). Live entries are blocked for the rest of today's UTC day. The pipeline also shows TRADES_STALLED — no paper or shadow entries in 30+ minutes — suggesting all T+30 candidates are being filtered or rejected. Live sell failures logged for v9-velmono-dev and v9-vel20-top5 at 08:05 and 10:31 UTC. Investigating entry gates and skips is the most urgent operator action.

**Two Strategies Have Crossed n=100:** v25-bot-excl-climbing (shadow) holds composite score 100/100: n=208, total=+3.25 SOL, drop_top3=+1.47 SOL, monthly=+12.38 SOL/mo. All four promotion gates clear; Panel 11 for the vel 20-50 + dd>-10% anchor shows STABLE (wr_std_dev 5.2%). Edge flag STRENGTHENING. v10-best-double (shadow) sits at score 87.83: n=107, total=+3.33 SOL, drop_top3=+1.01 SOL, monthly=+4.84 SOL/mo. All four gate thresholds pass by leave-one-out data; the `promotable` flag reads False in the snapshot (likely a code-side threshold artifact) — recommend auditing before acting. Panel 11 STABLE. Promotion proposals for both are in the action items.

**Kill Candidates:** v12-bcage1d-dd10 (n=77, total=-1.32 SOL, drop_top3=-3.99 SOL, monthly=-2.18 SOL/mo, score=20.4) is the clearest INVALID candidate — stripping the top-3 winners makes P&L dramatically worse, meaning the apparent gains are from 1–3 lottery trades masking systematic losses. At ~4.2 trades/day it reaches n=100 within a week. Recommend killing now. v14-sumabs-shadow (n=79, total=-0.77 SOL, drop_top3=-2.25 SOL, monthly=-1.56, score=25.8) shows the same pattern. Recommend killing.

**Watch — Three Mid-Tier Strategies Pacing Toward n=100:** v9shadow-vel20-top5 (n=65, drop_top3=+0.45, monthly pacing +4.88, edge STABLE), v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono (n=48, drop_top3=+1.35, monthly +5.94, edge DECAYING), and v9shadow-velmono-dev (n=42, drop_top3=+2.43, monthly +5.94, edge DECAYING — alltime readiness low 72.23). DECAYING flags on two of three warrant monitoring.

**Confirmed_recovery Signal:** Dominates best-combos leaderboard across 6+ filter pairings with opt_avg_ret 8–25%. All pre-n100 but cross-filter consistency is the strongest new signal in the research tier. vel 20-50 + climbing_t30_t45 (n=162, beats_baseline, opt=10.0%) is the core of v25.

**Live vs Shadow Divergence:** v25-bot-excl-climbing shadow: +3.25 SOL lifetime. v25-live-micro: -1.24 SOL today alone. Circuit breaker triggered on the live_micro variants. Validate execution quality before scaling capital.

**Operator Next Steps:** (1) Check /api/skips to diagnose TRADES_STALLED. (2) Approve or defer v25 + v10 promote proposals. (3) Approve or defer kills of v12-bcage1d-dd10 and v14-sumabs-shadow.

anomalies.message: Daily circuit breaker tripped — live P&L -1.22 SOL <= -1 SOL threshold. Live entries blocked rest of UTC day.
TRADES_STALLED: no paper or shadow entries in 30+ min. All T+30 candidates being filtered/rejected. Check /api/skips.
Live sell failures on v9-velmono-dev-live-micro and v9-vel20-top5-live-micro at 08:05 and 10:31 UTC.
v9shadow-velmono-dev DECAYING — readiness at alltime low 72.23 (was 88.0). n=42.
v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono DECAYING — readiness at alltime low 63.45 (was 88.2). n=48.
v10-best-double: all 4 gates pass by leave-one-out (n=107, drop3=+1.01, total=+3.33, monthly=+4.84) but promotable=False in snapshot. Audit gate logic.

patterns: v25-bot-excl-climbing has held score=100 for multiple consecutive days with STRENGTHENING edge — not a one-day spike.
confirmed_recovery filter appears in 6+ top best-combos pairings with opt_avg_ret 8–25% — consistent pre-n100 signal worth shadow-testing more broadly.
v12-bcage1d-dd10 and v14-sumabs-shadow both show drop_top3 << total_net_sol — lottery-ticket masking pattern approaching n=100.
v9 shadow strategies (vel20-top5, velmono-dev, velmid-liq-mono) DECAYING or at alltime score lows despite strong lifetime metrics.
Live micro strategies consistently underperform shadow mirrors — v25-live-micro -1.24 SOL today vs shadow +3.25 SOL lifetime.

promote.reason: All 4 gates clear: n=208, drop_top3=+1.47 SOL, total=+3.25 SOL, monthly=+12.38 SOL/mo. Score=100. Panel 11 STABLE. Edge STRENGTHENING.
All 4 gates clear by leave-one-out: n=107, drop_top3=+1.01 SOL, total=+3.33 SOL, monthly=+4.84 SOL/mo. Score=87.83. Audit promotable=False flag first.

kill.reason: n=77, total=-1.32 SOL, drop_top3=-3.99 SOL. Lottery-ticket masking. Will be INVALID at n=100.
n=79, total=-0.77 SOL, drop_top3=-2.25 SOL. Outlier-masked losses. No gate clears at n=100.

watch.reason: n=65, drop_top3=+0.45, monthly +4.88. ~35 trades to n=100. STABLE.
n=42, drop_top3=+2.43, monthly +5.94. Best outlier-stripped P&L among sub-100. DECAYING.
n=48, drop_top3=+1.35, monthly +5.94. DECAYING at alltime low.

action_items.summary: Promote v25-bot-excl-climbing to live — all 4 gates clear (n=208, drop3=+1.47, total=+3.25, monthly=+12.38). Score=100. Investigate live_micro execution losses before scaling.
Kill v12-bcage1d-dd10 — n=77, total=-1.32 SOL, drop_top3=-3.99 SOL. Lottery-ticket structure, INVALID at n=100.
Kill v14-sumabs-shadow — n=79, total=-0.77 SOL, drop_top3=-2.25 SOL. Outlier-masked losses, no gate clears at n=100.
Investigate TRADES_STALLED + live sell failures. Check /api/skips. Circuit breaker resets at UTC midnight.
Promote v10-best-double to live_micro — n=107, drop3=+1.01, total=+3.33, monthly=+4.84. All 4 gates clear by data. Audit promotable=False flag first.
